prompt: We are a US-based e-commerce company with $30M annual revenue. We collect personal information from about 80,000 California customers per year. Are we subject to CCPA/CPRA? If so, what are our core obligations?
assertions: Confirms the company IS subject to CCPA/CPRA because it meets the $25M annual gross revenue threshold — even though it falls short of the 100,000 consumer/household threshold
Explains that meeting ANY ONE of the three thresholds (revenue, data volume, monetization) triggers CCPA/CPRA applicability
Lists core compliance obligations including privacy notice at collection, comprehensive privacy policy, and the consumer rights program (right to know, delete, correct, opt-out, non-discrimination)
Explains the 'Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information' opt-out link requirement and GPC signal obligation
Mentions response deadlines: 45 days for access/delete/correct requests, with a possible 45-day extension
